title: Picarones with Sweet Potato and Peruvian Sauce
description: A traditional Peruvian dessert consisting of sweet potato donuts, fried and coated with a sweet syrup.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine mashed sweet potatoes, sugar, and shortening.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Using a cookie scoop, drop dough into hot oil and fry until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove donuts from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
In a small saucepan, combine Peruvian sugar and water to make syrup.
Bring syrup to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Drizzle syrup over fried donuts and serve immediately.
Optional: Dust with cinnamon or powdered sugar for added flavor.
